page: Google Cloud Platform c3-standard-44-lssd is a general-purpose server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8481C processor. It features 44 vCPUs, corresponding to 22 physical cores with hyper-threading, running at a base speed of 2.7 GHz. The system is configured with 176 GB of RAM, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of memory per core. Storage is a key highlight of this configuration, which bundles 3216 GB of local NVMe SSD storage across 8 local drives. The instance does not include any GPU accelerators or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong capabilities in specific processing tasks. The server achieves a strong rating in Passmark CPU performance with a score of 47611.69 and encryption tests at 38720.91, alongside strong Geekbench image processing at 16162.0. Static web serving throughput is also strong, reaching 40.85 GB/sec. For language model tasks, the instance demonstrates strong prompt processing and text generation speeds on small 135M models, as well as strong prompt processing at 175.16 tokens/sec on medium 7B models. However, text generation on large 70B models is a notable tradeoff, yielding a poor performance of 2.37 tokens/sec.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the c3-standard-44-lssd offers high resource density by bundling substantial local NVMe SSD storage directly with a high-vCPU compute profile. This integration reduces the need for external storage attachments, making it highly suitable for database operations, web serving, software compilation, and localized data processing where high-speed storage and balanced memory-to-CPU ratios are required.
description: Google Cloud Platform c3-standard-44-lssd is a general-purpose server configured with 44 vCPUs, 176 GB of RAM, and 3216 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8481C processor with 22 physical cores, this instance delivers a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. Benchmark results show strong performance in Passmark CPU tests, encryption, and static web serving throughput at 40.85 GB/sec. It also demonstrates strong prompt processing capabilities for small and medium language models, though text generation on large 70B models is a performance bottleneck. Lacking dedicated GPUs, this server is qualitatively cost-efficient for high-throughput local storage workloads. It is highly suited for database operations, web serving, and software compilation.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c3-standard-44-lssd features 44 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 176 GB RAM, and 3216 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, delivering strong performance for databases and web serving.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform c3-standard-44-lssd is a 44-vCPU server with 176 GB RAM and 3216 GB local NVMe SSD storage, optimized for databases.
tagline: A high-capacity general-purpose server featuring 44 vCPUs and 3.2 TB of local NVMe SSD storage for demanding database workloads.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 8481C processor with 44 vCPUs and 176 GB RAM
3216 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage across 8 drives
Strong performance in CPU encryption and static web serving
Efficient prompt processing for small and medium language models
Best suited for database operations, web serving, and software compilation
